keyEvents.text: Penalty saved. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Ørjan Nyland (Norway).
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Andreas Schjelderup replaces Antonio Nusa.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Matheus Cunha.
Substitution, Norway. Fredrik Aursnes replaces Julian Ryerson.
Substitution, Brazil. Neymar replaces Gabriel Martinelli.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Rayan.
Substitution, Brazil. Éderson Silva replaces Bruno Guimarães.
Goal! Brazil 0, Norway 1. Erling Haaland (Norway) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andreas Schjelderup with a cross.
Goal! Brazil 0, Norway 2. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andreas Schjelderup.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces David Møller Wolfe because of an injury.
Neymar (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Brazil 1, Norway 2. Neymar (Brazil) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Declan Rice (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Mexico 0, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross.
Goal! Mexico 0, England 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Harry Kane.
Goal! Mexico 1, England 2. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Mexico. Edson Álvarez replaces César Montes.
Jarell Quansah (England) is shown the red card.
Substitution, England. John Stones replaces Bukayo Saka.
Goal! Mexico 1, England 3. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Gilberto Mora.
Substitution, Mexico. Brian Gutiérrez replaces Luis Romo.
Marc Guéhi (England) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Mexico 2, England 3. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Jorge Sánchez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card.
Nico O'Reilly (England) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Nico O'Reilly.
Substitution, England. Dan Burn replaces Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, Mexico. Álvaro Fidalgo replaces Jorge Sánchez.
Substitution, Mexico. Guillermo Martínez replaces Julián Quiñones.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Harry Kane.
Johan Vásquez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card.
Jordan Henderson (England) is shown the yellow card.
